name: Theresa Nichols
ai_summary: Theresa Nichols is an experienced caregiver from Atlanta, Georgia, who grew up as the oldest of nine children and has extensive hands-on experience with children. She has flexible availability, is willing to travel up to an hour for shifts, and approaches conflict resolution by calmly explaining situations to children and involving parents when necessary.

transcripts.q3: Hello,my name is Teresa Nichols. I am the oldest of nine kids. I grew up practically raising my siblings, and I'll helping my mom changing diapers. So I'm still all of it. Really, I love kids. I live in directing, I like making stuff fun for them. Keeping them safe. And, you know, getting them through the day.
transcripts.q4: I live in Atlanta, Georgia and I am willing to travel over the max is an hour for any nearby shifts for me.
transcripts.q5: I have open availability. I'm open to anything. I have a lot of time on my hands so I'm hoping to whenever I'm needed.
